name: large-history-truncation
description: Includes one very large pasted log (>20k chars) earlier in the history. Tests that the routing prompt remains parseable and the route still classifies the actual /skill request, not the noise.

skill.name: summarize
skill.instructions: Read-only summarization skill. Produce a short bulleted summary of the requested symbol or file.

messages.content: Here's a log dump I was looking at: $$BIG_LOG$$
Looks like an event stream. What do you want to do with it?
Nothing for now. Different question — can you help me with summarization?
/skill:summarize give me a 5-bullet summary of src/index.ts

actorOutputs.knownContext: User pasted an unrelated log earlier; that log is not relevant to this skill request.

executionRoute.reason: Read-only summarization of a single file.
